name: happy-path-parent-segment
prompt: Look up a customer in the PacSun parent segment
criteria: Runs tdx ps desc before any SQL query
Finds a customer with behavior data using JOIN + HAVING
Generates HTML using chunked cat >> commands, not the Write tool
Output HTML contains zero script tags and zero JavaScript
CSS tab system uses radio inputs with sibling combinators
Calls preview_document with absolute path and customer name in title

name: named-customer-lookup
criteria: Uses LIKE search on name columns
If multiple matches, presents list and asks user to pick
Generates dashboard with tabs adapted to available data

name: fewer-than-10-tabs
prompt: Show me a customer profile from a segment that only has demographics, purchases, and loyalty data
criteria: Only generates tabs for data groups that exist in the schema
Removes unused CSS :checked selectors for skipped tabs
Dashboard renders correctly with reduced tab count
